w3_boundary: 본 보고의 탐지기 사다리·모든 val-A/val-B 수치의 유효 범위는 CubiCasa SEG-IR 우주 한정이다. E1 실무 도면 전이는 미검증이다.
objective: Compile a domain-axiom (ontology-constraint) rule library over real CubiCasa SEG-IR that flags wall-consistent handles, then measure its standalone precision (AUPRC) and its overlap with a GNN-A detector's residual errors on val-A DEV. REPORT_ONLY: no band, no adoption verdict. The frozen library SHA is the search-space input for the M-13 RSI loop.

truth.positive_label: handle in truth.wall_handles_flat (classes Wall + Wall External)
truth.labels_identical_to_sealed_evaluator: truth wall_handles_flat is the same per-handle label the sealed W2-09 evaluator (w2_09_valb.py SHA 85481aa4...) uses; the common-handle universe is a permutation of all prepared graph nodes, so set-level AUPRC and residual sets are order-invariant.

rule_schema.input: graph_builder.build_graph(ir, GraphConfig(), collect_edges=True) result: 17-dim node feature matrix (geometry + typed-edge fan-out) + directed typed edges (parallel_band, intersection_junction, proximity, collinearity, containment, instancing) + prepared node records (per-handle).
rule_schema.output: per-handle integer flag per axiom (1 = wall axiom antecedent holds) and weighted-sum score (every rule weight = 1, fixed, no learning).
rule_schema.stop_condition: >=3 rules per category and <=40 rules total; realized = 16 rules (4 per category).

compilation_procedure.reference_data: ir/train (4200 drawings) + train truth only. val-A DEV was never inspected during compilation; DEV is first touched at the measurement step.
compilation_procedure.method: For each candidate axiom, thresholds were set at discriminative operating points read from train feature distributions (wall vs non-wall percentiles) and per-axiom precision lift over ~250 train drawings. No DEV numbers, no learned weights.
compilation_procedure.freeze: rules_library.py frozen and SHA-256 sealed BEFORE any DEV read; revision requires a new prereg.

rules.threshold: has parallel neighbour in 0.5x-2.0x length AND log1p_length_norm>=1.5

measurement_plan.standalone_auprc: average_precision_score(truth wall label, rule weighted-sum score) over all val-A DEV handles. This is the same average-precision metric the sealed evaluator (w2_09_valb.py, sklearn.metrics.average_precision_score) reports as primary_auprc.

gnn_a_reproduction.code: gnn_formal.NodeGNN(screen, len(builder.EDGE_TYPES)=6, FormalConfig()); load state_dict; predict_node_model on torch CPU; message_mode=full.
gnn_a_reproduction.pool: arithmetic mean of the 3 seed sigmoid probabilities (matches gnn_formal ensemble rule)
gnn_a_reproduction.residual: FP union FN at threshold 0.5 vs truth wall label

residual_capture.per_rule_decomposition: for each of the 16 rules, |{rule fires} intersect residual| / |residual|; also split residual into FP and FN.

telemetry_contract: W3-TELEM {wall_seconds, peak_rss_bytes, peak_vram_bytes=N/A(no_GPU), device, budget_charge} dual-recorded in measurement.json and REPORT.md. CPU cap 10h.
constraints: GPU forbidden (M-2 owns the serial GPU queue)
